creator: franco@opnsense.org
text:
Created attachment 237997
beta1 test

Hi,

This is a work in progress for inclusion of Suricata version 7. The first beta was just released so there is more work to be done on their side as well as the port side: NETMAP option now requires API v14 support in FreeBSD which may not work in older supported FreeBSD releases, but I want to check this later and first provide a patch set to try out for interested parties.

Please DO NOT update the security/suricata port at this point.


Cheers,
Franco
